actual_column_names: 2011年、2016年及2021年按種族劃分的少數族裔人士數目

irregularities.label: MULTI_LEVEL_HEADER
irregularities.evidence: Headers span rows 2-3. Row 2 has years as top-level headers (2011 at col 3, 2016 at col 5, 2021 at col 7). Row 3 has sub-headers (數目/Number, 百分比/%) beneath each year group.
irregularities.details: This is a two-level hierarchical header structure. Years form the upper level, and data type (Number/Percentage) forms the lower level beneath each year.

irregularities.label: WIDE_FORMAT
irregularities.evidence: Column headers at row 2 are "2011", "2016", "2021" — these are dimension VALUES (years), not variable names. The year dimension is spread across columns rather than being contained in a single column.
irregularities.details: The defining test for wide format is whether column headers could be placed into a single new column. Here, the three year columns (2011, 2016, 2021) are clearly dimension values of the "Year" variable spread horizontally.

irregularities.label: IMPLICIT_AGGREGATION_ROWS
irregularities.evidence: Row 39 "所有少數族裔人士[3]" has values 451183 (2011), 584383 (2016), 619568 (2021). These equal the sums of the individual ethnic group categories above: 亞洲人（非華人）=365611 + 白人=55236 + 混血兒=29001 + 華人父或母=24649 + 其他[2]=1335 = 451183 for 2011.
irregularities.details: Row 39 is the aggregate total of all minority ethnic groups. Similarly, Row 42 "撇除外籍家庭傭工後的所有少數族裔人士[3]" aggregates the same groups excluding foreign domestic helpers (implied by the breakdown).

irregularities.label: METADATA_ROWS
irregularities.evidence: Rows 48-55 (11 rows) contain footnote references and notes in both Chinese and English. Row 48: "註釋：", Row 49-51: footnote text in col 1, Row 52: "Notes:", Rows 53-55: English footnote translations.
irregularities.details: These rows do not contain data values and serve only as explanatory metadata at the bottom of the spreadsheet.
